task.title: Document configuration options for CheckoutFlow
task.description: Complete the following task: Document configuration options for CheckoutFlow. Follow best practices and ensure quality.
constraints: Do NOT touch .env or any credential files.
Do NOT modify anything under tests/.
Do NOT change the database schema.

steps.thought: Let me see what files and directories we have to work with.
steps.observation:
# file Configuration
# Generated by setup wizard

[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
name = "file-project_db"
user = "app_user"
pool_size = 10

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
file_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
